ddls:
CREATE TABLE "restaurants" (
  "restaurant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each restaurant */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the restaurant */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the restaurant (e.g., Japanese, Italian) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the restaurant */,
  "total_area_visitors" REAL /* Total number of visitors in the area */,
  "restaurant_capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of visitors the restaurant can accommodate */,
  "opening_date" TEXT /* Date when the restaurant started operating */,
  "cuisine" TEXT /* Type of cuisine served by the restaurant */,
  "address" TEXT /* Detailed address of the restaurant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("restaurant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visitors" (
  "visitor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visitor entry */,
  "restaurant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the restaurant */,
  "visit_date" TEXT /* Date of the visit */,
  "visit_time" TEXT /* Time of the visit */,
  "visitor_type" TEXT /* Type of visitor (e.g., walk-in, reservation, online order) */,
  "visitors" INTEGER /* Number of visitors */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visitor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visitors_restaurant_id FOREIGN KEY ("restaurant_id") REFERENCES restaurants ("restaurant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather" (
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather entry */,
  "visit_date" TEXT /* Date of the weather data */,
  "avg_temperature" REAL /* Average temperature */,
  "high_temperature" REAL /* High temperature */,
  "low_temperature" REAL /* Low temperature */,
  "hours_sunlight" REAL /* Hours of sunlight */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Amount of precipitation */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genre_visitors" (
  "genre_visitor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre visitor entry */,
  "restaurant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the restaurant */,
  "visit_date" TEXT /* Date of the visit */,
  "genre_type" TEXT /* Type of genre (e.g., Japanese, Italian, Chinese) */,
  "total_genre_visitors" REAL /* Total number of visitors for the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_visitor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genre_visitors_restaurant_id FOREIGN KEY ("restaurant_id") REFERENCES restaurants ("restaurant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "area_visitors" (
  "area_visitor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each area visitor entry */,
  "restaurant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the restaurant */,
  "visit_date" TEXT /* Date of the visit */,
  "area_type" TEXT /* Type of area (e.g., urban, rural, suburban) */,
  "total_area_visitors" REAL /* Total number of visitors in the area */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("area_visitor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_area_visitors_restaurant_id FOREIGN KEY ("restaurant_id") REFERENCES restaurants ("restaurant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., restaurant manager, analyst, admin) */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the user */,
  "email_verification_status" TEXT /* Email verification status of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the platform was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used by the user to access the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "train_ind" (
  "train_ind_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training data indicator entry */,
  "visit_date" TEXT /* Date of the training data indicator */,
  "train_ind" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if it is a training data indicator (0 or 1) */,
  "train_ind_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the training data indicator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("train_ind_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "visitor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the visitor */,
  "restaurant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the restaurant */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date of the review */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating provided by the visitor */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_visitor_id FOREIGN KEY ("visitor_id") REFERENCES visitors ("visitor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_restaurant_id FOREIGN KEY ("restaurant_id") REFERENCES restaurants ("restaurant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "menu_items" (
  "menu_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each menu item */,
  "restaurant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the restaurant */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the menu item */,
  "item_description" TEXT /* Description of the menu item */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the menu item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("menu_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_menu_items_restaurant_id FOREIGN KEY ("restaurant_id") REFERENCES restaurants ("restaurant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "visitor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the visitor */,
  "restaurant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the restaurant */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date of the order */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_visitor_id FOREIGN KEY ("visitor_id") REFERENCES visitors ("visitor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_restaurant_id FOREIGN KEY ("restaurant_id") REFERENCES restaurants ("restaurant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order */,
  "menu_item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the menu item */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the menu item ordered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_menu_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("menu_item_id") REFERENCES menu_items ("menu_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., cash, card, online) */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date of the payment */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount paid */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)
